Petition For Instructions Regarding Claims By The Co-Trustees Beneficiaries And Other Adjustments To The Final Distribution Of The Trust
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Continued To Jul-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for William Burkett. James Barringer (via court call) for (co-trustee & respondent) Juliette Hooker.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 21, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 22, 2015. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on July 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Property And Transferring Properties To Trust
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rebecca Renzas for Juliet Hooker.

Ms. Renzas stated that a Court order is needed to transfer title of burial plots into the Trust and confirms that there is no general assignment. The Court noted that completion of transfer can be done with a 13100 declaration. The Petition for Order Confirming Title to Property and Transferring, etc. was granted as to the Redondo property and denied as to the burial plots (subject to review and modification of the proposed order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.

Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Reset Petition For Order Instructing Successor Co-Trusstee To Distribute Trust Assets And For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolff (Counsel for Juliet Hooker); David Baer (Counsel for Katherine Congdon); Monica Mazzei (Counsel for William Burkett).

Counsel noted the pendency of certain concerns with respect to the Settlement Agreement and the possibility of the need for a Petition to Enforce Settlement Agreement. Counsel also noted that the matter of the accounting was not fully resolved as yet. After discussion, the Court and counsel agreed that both pending Petitions could be taken off calendar with the understanding that this action did not constitute a dismissal of either Petition and that this disposition would be without prejudice to either counsel reviving either Petition by restatement of any issues not resolved by the Settlement Agreement.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Reset Petition For Order Instructing Successor Co-Trusstee To Distribute Trust Assets And For Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Continued To Mar-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Merger Of Trusts
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolfe (Counsel for Juliet Hooker); David Baer (Counsel for Katherine Congdon); Monica Mazzei (Counsel for William Burkett).

Although the matter was granted without appearance, counsel appeared to advise the Court of certain changes they wished to memorialize via revised Order. After discussion regarding the same, the Court once again granted the Petition for approval of settlement agreement as revised, signing the Order for same in open court. Subsequent to the hearing, counsel re-appeared at the same calendar call to advise the Court on the record that the Settlement previously approved was not a resolution of all issues pending before the Court. Consequently, counsel requested, and the Court granted, a further status hearing set for March 12, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 with respect to the remaining Petitions.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR #7782 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
